nextAction: Phase 10 (§22.7 prompt 10): inventory extended per §10b — stock TRANSFERS between warehouses (request → approve → execute: TRANSFER_OUT at source avg + TRANSFER_IN at same cost, single tx via postMovement outer-tx); STOCK COUNTS (create count sheet per warehouse, enter counted qty, variance report, DIRECTOR-approved posting of adjustments ADJUST_IN/ADJUST_OUT with §19 signature); REORDER automation (ItemStockPolicy min/max/reorderQty per item×warehouse; when on-hand < min after any OUT, auto-create a DRAFT PR for reorderQty and notify the purchaser — once per breach); inventory DASHBOARD (value by warehouse/category, slow movers, below-min list). npm run check + seed + browser E2E (transfer moves qty+cost, count posts signed adjustment, OUT below min creates draft PR), Phase Report, commit phase-10.
